interpretation: ⚠️ Potential degradation - enhancements may be too strict (high gate rate)

key_insight.no_need_to_wait: Partial enhancement is meaningful - no need to wait for 20/20
key_insight.gate_rate_note: Higher failure rate ≠ bad. May indicate better selectivity filtering weak signals.
key_insight.quality_metric: Compare P&L and win rate (WR) to confirm if delta = good or bad
key_insight.next_action: Deploy Phase 3/4 with same dual-tracker methodology
